column2: Verify Independent Assessment Process for Remote Pilots
column3: ['Check if the operator has implemented an independent assessment process for remote pilots. ', 'Confirm that remote pilots undergo regular assessments and meet all requirements. ', 'Verify if the operator can confirm that their remote pilots are competent and qualified based on the assessment results. ']
column4: ["The operator either has or hasn't implemented an independent assessment process. ", 'Remote pilots are either regularly assessed and meet all requirements, or they do not. ', 'The operator confirms that their remote pilots are competent and qualified or not. ']
